D1 Optics L4 Analyze Reference

Fresnel Reflectance Curves

sweep the incidence angle and watch R_s and R_p diverge from each other

For unpolarised light the two polarisation components reflect differently. R_s rises monotonically; R_p drops to zero at Brewster's angle, then climbs to grazing reflection.

Slide θ and the lower-medium n₂. The probe line marks the current angle and the gold tick shows the computed Brewster angle θ_B = arctan(n₂).
